name: Shutterstock, Inc.
summary: . Overview Shutterstock, Inc. (referred to herein as the Company, we, our, and us) is a leading global creative platform connecting brands and businesses to high quality content. Our platform brings together users and contributors of content by providing readily-searchable content that our customers pay to license and by compensating contributors as their content is licensed. Contributors upload their content to our web properties in exchange for royalty payments based on customer download activ...
